markets.question: CD Concepción vs. O'Higgins FC: O/U 2.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Chile Primera División game between CD Concepción and O'Higgins FC, scheduled for February 1 at 10:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if CD Concepción and O'Higgins FC combine to score 3 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 3, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on anfp.cl. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

events.title: CD Concepción vs. O'Higgins FC - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Chile Primera División game, scheduled for February 1 at 10:00 AM ET.

markets.question: CD Concepción vs. O'Higgins FC: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Chile Primera División game between CD Concepción and O'Higgins FC, scheduled for February 1 at 10:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both CD Concepción and O'Higgins FC each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on anfp.cl. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.
